questions.title: Implement a Stack
questions.prompt: Create a stack using an array.
questions.hint: Think about how you would track which element is on top. Consider using an integer variable that moves up when you add an element and down when you remove one.
questions.sampleSolution: Use an array and track the top index.
questions.sampleExplanation: Maintain a top pointer that increments on push and decrements on pop.

solutions.content: Use an array and track the top index.

questions.title: Binary Search
questions.hint: Start by finding the middle index of the array. If the target is smaller than the middle element, which half do you search next? Make sure you have a base case for when the array can no longer be divided.
questions.sampleSolution: Divide the array in half each recursive call.
questions.sampleExplanation: Compare the midpoint to the target and recurse left or right.

solutions.content: Divide the array in half each recursive call.
